name: reg-cli
description: Visual regression testing CLI (Wasm-backed). The publishable package now lives under `js/` (`@bokuweb/reg-cli-wasm`). This root package exists to make the repo installable for tooling that scaffolds via `pnpm install` (e.g. the `wasm-test` CI job, which materialises `report/ui/dist/*` via `scripts/build-ui.sh`).
author: bokuweb
